title: 05 seats transform behind tina
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Image 1 is the edit target and controls Tina's exact back-seat position, identity, wardrobe, gummy, pouch, dark car interior, camera relationship, and ordinary gray street. Image 2 supports face and candy appearance only and must not change the crop. Preserve all geometry while transforming only the upholstery material in a visible traveling wave. The change begins beneath and behind Tina in the rear seat as glossy translucent lychee-pink gummy material, moves across the rear headrests, and continues forward toward the driver. Show a crisp but organic boundary between normal charcoal upholstery and gummy upholstery. Tina turns to watch it pass. Outside remains documentary-real and unchanged. No orange seats, melted flesh, slime, exterior transformation, added passengers, or front-seat Tina.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage or storyboard grid. Follow the stated role of every reference image rather than blending all references indiscriminately. Preserve Tina as the same bookish eighteen-year-old young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz pouch. Tina's fixed meeting point is the back seat of the car: never move her into the driver or front passenger seat. Make the specified physical situation immediately legible in one 16:9 image. Keep transformations benign, youthful, tactile, and suitable for a live-action candy commercial. Avoid captions, borders, split screens, watermarks, generic candyland, random rainbow effects, body horror, violent wreckage, and added package copy.
